title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is an open source AI image model optimized for high resolution 4K image generation. It integrates with ComfyUI workflows and can be paired with text encoders like Gemma 2b for text-to-image tasks.
